subject: Quick Reminder – Invoice #INV-2024-006 | ₹1,76,000 Due
body:
Hi Ananya,

I hope you’re doing well! This is a friendly reminder that Invoice #INV-2024-006 for ₹1,76,000 was due on 01 May 2025.

If you have already processed this payment, please disregard this message. Otherwise, you can make a quick payment using the link below:

🔗 Pay Now: https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-006

If you have any questions about this invoice, feel free to reach out.

Thank you!

Warm regards,
Acme Corp Finance Department
📞 +91-9876543210

subject: Payment Reminder – Invoice #INV-2024-002 | ₹1,28,500 (16 Days Overdue)
body:
Dear Priya,

We hope this message finds you well. We are writing to follow up on Invoice #INV-2024-002 for ₹1,28,500, which was due on 25 April 2025 and is now 16 days overdue.

We understand that payments can sometimes be delayed, and we would appreciate it if you could confirm the expected payment date at your earliest convenience.

Please use the payment link below to process the payment:

🔗 https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-002

If you have already made this payment, please share the transaction reference so we can update our records.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Acme Corp Finance Department
📞 +91-9876543210

subject: IMPORTANT: Outstanding Payment – Invoice #INV-2024-003 | ₹5,67,000 (31 Days Overdue)
body:
Dear Mr. Verma,

Despite our previous reminders, Invoice #INV-2024-003 for ₹5,67,000 remains unpaid as of today, now 31 days past its due date of 10 April 2025.

We must bring to your attention that continued non-payment may impact:
• Your credit terms with Acme Corp
• Future order processing
• Our business relationship

We request your immediate attention to this matter. Please respond within 48 hours with either:
1. Confirmation of payment, or
2. A clear payment commitment date

🔗 Pay Now: https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-003
📞 Call: +91-9876543210

Regards,
Acme Corp Finance Department

subject: FINAL NOTICE – Invoice #INV-2024-004 | ₹89,000 – Immediate Action Required
body:
Dear Ms. Patel,

This is our final reminder regarding Invoice #INV-2024-004 for ₹89,000, which is now 44 days overdue (due date: 28 March 2025).

Despite multiple previous communications, this invoice remains unpaid. We must inform you that failure to remit payment within 24 hours will result in:
• Escalation to our legal and recovery team
• Suspension of all credit facilities
• Potential impact on your business credit rating

Please act immediately:

🔗 Pay Now: https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-004
📞 Call Immediately: +91-9876543210

Acme Corp Finance Department
